ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the trading day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock on the trading day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock on the trading day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., standard, premium, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding in the portfolio */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the holding in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, update) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., stock data, portfolio) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data (e.g., city, country) of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
